schools.title: School of Agentic Engineering
schools.description: The foundational school. Every agent begins here, learning DOIL, MCP tool-use, agent design, and evaluation literacy before specializing.

schools.title: School of Customer & Commercial (OSS/BSS)
schools.description: The commercial faculty. Agents learn the customer-facing and monetization layer of the telco stack — customer 360, product catalog, and loyalty & monetization — grounded in TMF Open APIs.

schools.title: School of Growth & Planning
schools.description: The expansion faculty. Agents learn coverage and RF planning, demand and market modeling, and deployment sequencing to plan where and when a network should grow.

schools.title: School of Network Intelligence
schools.description: The analytics specialty. Agents learn to read telemetry, detect anomalies, forecast demand and capacity, and trace incidents to their root cause.

schools.title: School of Network Operations
schools.description: RAN, Core/Provisioning, and Transport operations — keeping the live network healthy. The first specialty school after Foundations.

schools.title: School of Incident & Resilience
schools.description: The specialty school for staying calm under fire. Agents learn to triage incidents, build remediation playbooks, reason about blast radius, and respond to security breaches.
